cboCostEstimates.description: As ordered reported by the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform on April 30, 2025
cboCostEstimates.title: H.R. 1830, a bill to designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 840 Front Street in Casselton, North Dakota, as the “Commander Delbert Austin Olson Post Office"

status.constitutionalAuthorityStatementText:
[Congressional Record Volume 171, Number 41 (Tuesday, March 4, 2025)]
[House]
From the Congressional Record Online through the Government Publishing Office [www.gpo.gov]
By Ms. FEDORCHAK:
H.R. 1830.
Congress has the power to enact this legislation pursuant
to the following:
Article I, Section 8, Clause 7:
The Congress shall have Power . . . To establish Post
Offices and post Roads; . . .''
[Page H976]

latestAction.text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.

status.title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 840 Front Street in Casselton, North Dakota, as the Commander Delbert Austin Olson Post Office.

committees.name: Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs Committee

summaries.text: This bill designates the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 840 Front Street in Casselton, North Dakota, as the "Commander Delbert Austin Olson Post Office".
